scripts.dev:stack: cd local && docker compose build web-app control-plane metrics vpn-node && docker compose up -d postgres control-plane metrics web-app vpn-node && docker compose watch
scripts.dev:desktop:wait: sh -c 'echo "Waiting for web-app on http://localhost:3000..."; until curl -sSf http://localhost:3000/desktop >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done; echo "web-app is up; starting desktop..."; cd apps/desktop && bun run dev'
scripts.dev:stripe: sh -c 'if command -v stripe >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Starting Stripe listener (loading .env)..."; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . .env; set +a; if [ -n "$STRIPE_SECRET_KEY" ]; then echo "Using STRIPE_SECRET_KEY from .env for Stripe CLI"; stripe listen --api-key "$STRIPE_SECRET_KEY" --forward-to http://localhost:3000/api/webhooks/stripe; else echo "[dev] STRIPE_SECRET_KEY not set in .env; starting stripe listen without explicit --api-key"; stripe listen --forward-to http://localhost:3000/api/webhooks/stripe; fi; else echo "[dev] Stripe CLI not installed; skipping stripe listen"; fi'
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "stack,desktop,stripe" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,cyan" "bun run dev:stack" "bun run dev:desktop:wait" "bun run dev:stripe"
